code:
%%{CloudNative_Serverless}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [CloudNative_DockerImage] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [CloudNative_DockerImage] state Pending {CloudNative_Serverless] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster] } state Approved {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [CloudNative_HelmChart] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个评论状态流转图，核心场景是：用户提交评论后先进入待审核状态，审核通过才能公开可见，不通过则隐藏。另外还要支持删除和编辑操作。
明白。我注意到您提到待审核状态，这个Pending状态内部需要细分吗？比如是否需要区分刚创建和正在审核中的子状态？
需要细分。Pending内部应该包含一个AwaitingModeration子状态，代表等待人工审核。另外Approved和Rejected也做成复合状态——Approved里面包含Visible和Edited的循环，Rejected里面包含Hidden和可以添加拒绝原因的WithReason状态。
确认一下：Approved状态内是Visible→Edited→Visible的循环，Rejected状态内是Hidden→WithReason→结束。那删除操作呢？哪些状态可以触发删除？
Pending、Approved、Rejected这三个主状态都可以删除，删除后统一流转到Deleted终止状态。还有，每个复合状态都需要关联一个云原生组件作为视觉标识，比如Pending关联DockerImage，Approved关联K8sCluster，Rejected关联HelmChart。
好的，我正在绘制：Pending复合状态包含AwaitingModeration，Approved包含Visible和Edited的循环转换，Rejected包含Hidden和WithReason。三个主状态都指向Deleted。右侧我添加四个注释说明各状态的业务含义。
等等，Rejected的流转有问题。WithReason之后应该指向HelmChart作为结束标记，而不是直接消失。另外Pending内部的AwaitingModeration之后也应该指向K8sCluster作为出口。

已修正：WithReason→CloudNative_HelmChart，AwaitingModeration→CloudNative_K8sCluster。所有复合状态的出口都已正确连接。最终结构确认：评论从DockerImage创建进入Pending，审核通过后进入Approved的Visible状态可编辑，拒绝则进入Rejected的Hidden状态可添加原因，任何阶段都可删除至Deleted终止。
